mapper.select: /* SQL ID : LogUserConnDAO.selectLogUserConnState 설 명 : 사용자 접속 상태 조회 */ SELECT USER_ID , ACSR_GBNCD , SBJCT_ID , JOB_HSTRY_CD , CNTN_DVC_TYCD , SESS_ID , RGTR_IP , CNTN_DTTM FROM TB_LOG_USER_CONN_STAT WHERE 1=1 AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.CNTN_DTTM DESC, B.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.USER_ID , A.ACSR_GBNCD , A.SBJCT_ID , A.JOB_HSTRY_CD , A.CNTN_DVC_TYCD , A.SESS_ID , A.RGTR_IP , A.CNTN_DTTM , B.USERNM , B.MOBILE_NO , B.EMAIL FROM TB_LOG_USER_CONN_STAT A, TB_LMS_USR B WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.ACSR_GBNCD = #{connGbn} AND A.CNTN_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP - NUMTODSINTERVAL(#{searchTm}, 'MINUTE'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.SBJCT_ID IN
#{item}
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : LogUserConnDAO.listLogCorsUserConnState 설 명 : 과목 접속자 목록 조회 */
ORDER BY B.USERNM

/* SQL ID : LogUserConnDAO.countLogUserConnState 설 명 : 과목 접속자 수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) Z
